hooks.command: cat > /dev/null; C=$(git status --short --untracked-files=no 2>/dev/null | grep -v PROJECT_STATUS.md | wc -l | tr -d ' '); S=$(git status --short PROJECT_STATUS.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$C"  -gt 0 ] && [ "$S" -eq 0 ] && printf '%s' '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Aggiorna PROJECT_STATUS.md prima di concludere."}' || true
